2248640.name: One Way To Wonderland
2248640.description:
One Way To Wonderland is a turn-based point'and'click game, where each collected card grants you different powers and you fight your way through waves of enemies to mythical Wonderland.

Collect different cards

Discover over 30 different cards, each changing the way game is played dramatically like throwing a scythe when killing an enemy or gain additional life or passively gain chance to critically strike an opponent or gain armor during weather event. The more cards you collect, the more your gameplay will change.

Fight hordes of enemies

Fight your way through hordes of hand-crafted 16 enemies, like small goblin and dashing centaurs to hammer-throwing mushrooms

Each class has different playstyle

Unlock 2 different classes, each having different playstyles, Powerful mage centered around damage-over-time effects or archer focused on landing critical strikes.

Acquire different skills

Each applied skill grants you different ability, like striking your opponent with lightning and throwing a boomerang that hurts each enemy on its way back.
2248640.supported_languages:
英语*, 波兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
